underlying_goal: Pick up a Linear ticket (INT-164) to add new language support for the real-time interpretation tool, configure permissions, save workflow preferences, and implement a feature flag for the new languages across config, Scribe real-time, and Azure TTS
friction_detail: User interrupted tool executions three times, once to redirect to permissions setup, once to question wildcard syntax correctness, and once after the plan was written.
brief_summary: User wanted to pick up a Linear ticket for adding new languages, set up auto-approve permissions for Linear tools, save workflow memories, and begin implementing a feature flag for new language support; ticket management and permissions were completed but feature implementation was still in planning when the session ended.
